MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: MATTER COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ACTION SETTLED. TRIAL DATE VACATED. JUDGEMENT FOR PLTF OF POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 2211 VAN NESS AVENUE, #203 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. DEFT SHALL VACATE PREMISES BY NOVEMBER 1, 2004, 11:59PM, WITH NO RENT DUE.
IF DEFT(EXCEPT FOR MICHAEL PAYTON) DOES NOT VACATE THE PREMISES BY NOV. 1, 2004, PLTF WILL MAKE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR $2000.00 BACK RENT AND $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES AND SURRENDER OF THE PREMISES.PLTF CSL:MICHAEL ROSSOFF, ESQ.; DEFT IN PRO PER;JUDGE PRO TEM:ZADIK SHAPIRO, CLERK-BBSURRATT; NOT REPORTED.
